revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{When}} begin-->{{Fix | link = Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Dates and numbers#Chronological items | text = when? | title = {{{reason|The time period mentioned near this tag is ambiguous.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Vague or ambiguous time }}<!--{{When}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:All articles with vague or ambiguous time]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{When}} begin-->{{Fix | link = Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Dates and numbers#Chronological items | text = when? | title = {{{reason|The time period mentioned near this tag is ambiguous.}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Vague or ambiguous time }}<!--{{When}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:All articles with vague or ambiguous time]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
